title: DARE Cobblemon
description: A world full of pokemons where you can catch as many as you want, or train them to grow stronger  and defeat other trainers. The modpack is light and feature a lot of addons for Cobblemon.
body:
Welcome!

This a modpack focused on Cobblemon mod that bring a large pack of creatures from the world of Pokémon to minecraft. This modpack features a lot of add-ons, some for QoL and others for challenge you. So would you like to explore this world?


![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82d0a6345c76308fdab7518f1c8154d753d7a2cf.png)
- Cobblemon mod that adds a vast list of pokemons to your world, as well as some resources for you to make your own pokeballs and a great amount of pokemon itens to help you along your journey.

- A ton of Cobblemon add-ons that add things like: riding your pokemons, gyms for you to challenge your self, useful information about the pokemons, a bounty hunter system that gives you reward to catching certain pokemons on specific conditions and some more.

- Waystones to make it easier to travel long distances.

- Nature Compass is here to make it easier to find the biomes you need.

- Xaeros minimap with cobblemon icons to help you find them.

- Resourcepacks to make the game more immerssive.


This is a modpack thinked to be lightweight so it has a short range of mods that aren't focused on cobblemon.
2-4 RAM required, shaders and decorative resourcepacks aren't added on pack, but feel free to use as many as you see fit.
